Package org.apache.arrow.adbc.core

Interface BulkIngestBuilder

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable
public interface BulkIngestBuilder extends AutoCloseable
A fluent builder-style interface for configuring and executing a bulk ingest.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BulkIngestBuilder
    appendMode()
    Append to the target table; fail if not found.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    bind(ArrowReader stream)
    Ingest data from the given reader.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    bind(VectorSchemaRoot root)
    Ingest data from the given root.
    void
    close()
    Clean up any state in this bulk ingest.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    createAppendMode()
    Create the target table if necessary, append if already exists.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    createMode()
    Create the target table; fail if already exists.
    default AdbcStatement.UpdateResult
    ingest()
    Execute the bulk ingest.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    mode(BulkIngestMode mode)
    How to handle an already-existing/non-existent target table.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    option(IngestOption option)
    Set an arbitrary ingest option.
    <T> BulkIngestBuilder
    option(TypedKey<T> key, T value)
    Set a statement option before ingest.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    replaceMode()
    Drop (if exists) and create the target table.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    targetCatalog(String catalog)
    Ingest into a table in the given catalog.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    targetSchema(String schema)
    Ingest into a table in the given schema.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    targetTable(String table)
    Ingest into a table with the given name (required).
    default BulkIngestBuilder
    temporary()
    Ingest into a temporary table.
    BulkIngestBuilder
    temporary(boolean isTemporary)
    Whether to ingest into a temporary table or not.
    AdbcStatement
    toStatement()
    Convert this builder to an AdbcStatement (low-level API for further control) without executing.

  • Method Details

    • createMode

      BulkIngestBuilder createMode() throws AdbcException
      Create the target table; fail if already exists.
      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • appendMode

      BulkIngestBuilder appendMode() throws AdbcException
      Append to the target table; fail if not found.
      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • replaceMode

      BulkIngestBuilder replaceMode() throws AdbcException
      Drop (if exists) and create the target table.
      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • createAppendMode

      BulkIngestBuilder createAppendMode() throws AdbcException
      Create the target table if necessary, append if already exists.
      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • mode

      BulkIngestBuilder mode(BulkIngestMode mode) throws AdbcException
      How to handle an already-existing/non-existent target table. Default is BulkIngestMode.CREATE.

      Also see the convenience methods createMode(), appendMode(), replaceMode(), and createAppendMode().

      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • bind

      BulkIngestBuilder bind(VectorSchemaRoot root) throws AdbcException
      Ingest data from the given root.

      Like AdbcStatement.bind(VectorSchemaRoot), this ingest will NOT close the given root. If a different root or stream is bound, this root will simply be forgotten.

      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • bind

      BulkIngestBuilder bind(ArrowReader stream) throws AdbcException
      Ingest data from the given reader.

      Like AdbcStatement.bind(ArrowReader), this ingest WILL close the given stream. If a different root or stream is bound, this stream will be closed.

      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • targetTable

      BulkIngestBuilder targetTable(String table) throws AdbcException
      Ingest into a table with the given name (required).
      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • targetSchema

      BulkIngestBuilder targetSchema(String schema) throws AdbcException
      Ingest into a table in the given schema.
      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • targetCatalog

      BulkIngestBuilder targetCatalog(String catalog) throws AdbcException
      Ingest into a table in the given catalog.
      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • temporary

      default BulkIngestBuilder temporary() throws AdbcException
      Ingest into a temporary table.
      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • temporary

      BulkIngestBuilder temporary(boolean isTemporary) throws AdbcException
      Whether to ingest into a temporary table or not.
      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • option

      BulkIngestBuilder option(IngestOption option) throws AdbcException
      Set an arbitrary ingest option.
      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • option

      <T> BulkIngestBuilder option(TypedKey<T> key, T value) throws AdbcException
      Set a statement option before ingest.
      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • toStatement

      AdbcStatement toStatement() throws AdbcException
      Convert this builder to an AdbcStatement (low-level API for further control) without executing.

      The caller is responsible for closing the returned statement.

      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • ingest

      default AdbcStatement.UpdateResult ingest() throws AdbcException
      Execute the bulk ingest.

      This will consume the bound stream, if any. To ingest again, bind a new stream or root or update data in the already-bound root.

      Throws:
      AdbcException

    • close

      void close() throws AdbcException
      Clean up any state in this bulk ingest.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Throws:
      AdbcException
